# Aero Team

> Aero Team builds fast, modern web applications, custom SaaS platforms, e-commerce stores, and digital solutions designed to help ambitious businesses scale online.

## Core Pages

- [Home Page](https://aeroteam.vercel.app/): Overview of Aero Team's web development services, agency advantages, and client project highlights.
- [All Projects](https://aeroteam.vercel.app/projects): Complete showcase of mockup concepts, SaaS landing pages, admin dashboards, and custom web platforms built by Aero Team.

## Legal & Compliance

- [Privacy Policy](https://aeroteam.vercel.app/privacy): Information on user data collection, privacy practices, and security measures.
- [Terms of Service](https://aeroteam.vercel.app/terms): Terms and conditions governing the use of Aero Team's web services and platform.
- [Cookie Policy](https://aeroteam.vercel.app/cookies): Details on cookie usage and tracking preferences across the website.

## Optional Resources

- [Sitemap](https://aeroteam.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap listing all indexable pages for search engines and crawlers.
